amendment.description: An amendment numbered 50 printed in Part B of House Report 119-648 to redirect $481,832,000 from the NATO Security Investment Program to Military Construction Defense-Wide.
amendment.purpose: Amendment sought to redirect $481,832,000 from the NATO Security Investment Program account to the Military Construction, Defense-Wide account.

vote.text: On agreeing to the Steube amendment (A006) Failed by recorded vote: 80 - 333 (Roll no. 174).

action.text: House amendment not agreed to: On agreeing to the Steube amendment (A006) Failed by recorded vote: 80 - 333 (Roll no. 174).
Roll call votes on amendments in House
